_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Hydrocephalus is progressive and associated with increased ICP

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers with details of treatment given
Detailed ICPs with vital (BP and Pulse) and Treatment details

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment submitted?
Was neuroimaging report submitted suggestive of hydrocephalus?

cpd_claim.q: Was Detailed ICPs with vital (BP and Pulse) and Treatment details submitted?
Was the Detailed Discharge Summary submitted with the date of the follow-up mentioned?

common_queries: Neuroimaging report not submitted or not suggestive of hydrocephalus
Clinical notes with evaluation findings, indications, or planned treatment not submitted or incomplete
Detailed Indoor case papers or treatment details not submitted
Detailed discharge summary not submitted or missing date of follow-up
Detailed ICPs with vital (BP and Pulse) and treatment details not submitted for claims

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: DNB / MD (General Medicine/General surgery / Pediatric Medicine/Pediatric surgery/Neurosurgery/Neuro medicine)
